# Caliber Web Studio
> Detroit-based web design and AI-powered website agency. We help local businesses get more customers from their website.

## Services
- [Web design](https://www.caliberwebstudio.com/services)
- [Pricing](https://www.caliberwebstudio.com/pricing)
- [Med spa websites](https://www.caliberwebstudio.com/med-lab)
- [Detroit area pages](https://www.caliberwebstudio.com/areas)
- [Plumber website design](https://www.caliberwebstudio.com/plumbers)
- [Startup Complete](https://www.caliberwebstudio.com/startup-complete)

Darrin Singer Jr., founder and lead developer. Detroit metro service area.
